top_signals.title: British Land: Return to office debate is over
top_signals.summary: British Land has declared the debate over returning to the office “over,” as it prepares to capitalise on constrained supply and a “wave of demand” for commercial property from AI firms.  The FTSE 100 property developer saw its profit before tax jump by 32 per cent to £450m in the year to March, as the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan tourism declines in April after record
top_signals.summary: The number of international visitors fell 5.5% to 3.69 million in April year-on-year, the Japan National Tourism Organization said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dodgers sneak past Padres in 9th, move atop NL West
top_signals.summary: Freddie Freeman homered twice as Los Angeles ​won for the sixth time ⁠in seven games.
